So for product teams, we typically do two weeks sprints.
I think we tried, we might have touched on like a hybrid version of this a while, while back, and it didn't fit your guys's needs because we needed to move quickly and pivot.

on your guys' calendars, but I think those 15 minutes really help with daily check-ins.

We'll go through and talk in depth about them, prioritize them, understand the level of effort associated with them, we'll story point them.
And then in the sprint planning, we basically drag everything in.
This is the highest priority.
This is what we're going to work on over the next two weeks.
